mapper.sql: SELECT br.*, r.reader_no, r.name AS reader_name, b.book_no, b.book_name, b.category FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN reader r ON br.reader_id = r.id LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id
mapper.select:
WHERE 1 = 1
AND br.status = #{status}
AND (r.reader_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.book_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.book_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY br.id DESC
WHERE br.reader_id = #{readerId} ORDER BY br.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_record(reader_id, book_id, borrow_time, due_time, status, overdue_days, fine, create_time) VALUES(#{readerId}, #{bookId}, #{borrowTime}, #{dueTime}, 'BORROWED', 0, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM borrow_record WHERE status = 'BORROWED'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM borrow_record WHERE status = 'BORROWED' AND due_time < NOW()
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM borrow_record WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND book_id = #{bookId} AND status = 'BORROWED'
